heading: Omitted
label: 581a–2 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized advance of funds to cooperators, was from the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriation Act, 1957, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in following prior appropriation acts:act June 13, 1956, ch. 380, title II, § 20070 Stat. 269, title II, § 200, .June 16, 1955, ch. 14769 Stat. 154, title I, § 101, .June 29, 1954, ch. 40968 Stat. 308, title I, § 101, .July 28, 1953, ch. 25167 Stat. 212, .Act July 5, 1952, ch. 574, title I, § 10166 Stat. 343
